verdict: Operator-enacted C_full internal scope closure: T7-SCOPE_{C_full, thin O}. I_off^Cfull=1/(23.2*21)=2.053e-3 (universal off-diagonal cap, binds < I_c^sel); operating I_op=2e-3 interior, R_lead=0.974<1, thin headroom 2.6%% (NOT Step-1 20%%). n_pack<=40.88 across the band => N/2<=20<20.55=K* throughout, closure holds over the whole widened mu^2 band. EXT optional (K_floor~3 => x5.39), stays T2. Region R_Cfull={mu^2 in (0,mu^2_max), I in (0,min(I_c^sel,I_off^Cfull))}.

claims.name: cfull_offdiag_cap_and_closure
claims.detail: (I_off^Cfull=1/(23.2*21)=2.0525e-03; operating I_op=2.0e-3 < it; R_lead=23.2*(1+20)*2e-3=0.9744<1 (THIN). The C_full intensity cap is the universal off-diagonal cap, NOT the Step-1 selection cap 2.41e-3)

claims.name: cfull_headroom_thin_not_step1
claims.detail: (C_full off-diagonal headroom (I_off^Cfull-I_op)/I_op=2.6% -- thin, strict; this is NOT the Step-1 selection-window headroom 20% (I_c=2.41e-3). The thin margin is the recorded scope qualifier)

claims.name: closure_across_widened_band
claims.detail: (n_pack(mu^2) in [39.40,40.88] over the band; N=floor(n_pack)<=40 so N/2<=20<20.55=K* throughout => K_floor<=N/2<=20 and R_lead<1 across the whole widened mu^2 band)

claims.name: ext_margin_x5p39_optional
claims.detail: (EXT optional: K_floor~3 => R_lead=23.2*(1+3)*2e-3=0.1856, margin x5.39 (precise; the earlier 'x6' was approximate). EXT remains T2; enactment does NOT depend on it -- thin closure stands alone)

claims.name: cfull_region_offdiag_binds
claims.detail: (at the anchor mu^2=0.005: I_off^Cfull=2.0525e-03 < I_c^sel=2.5024e-03, so for C_full the OFF-DIAGONAL cap binds; R_Cfull={(I,mu^2): 0<mu^2<mu^2_max=0.0342, 0<I<min(I_c^sel,I_off^Cfull)}, operating point interior)
